headline: Garmin’s new screen-free fitness tracker doesn’t require a subscription
summary: Garmin introduced the Cirqa, a new smart band for advanced fitness tracking. It's screen-free to eliminate distractions and boasts up to 10 days of battery life. Similar to Whoop and Fitbit Air, it tracks data using heart rate and other metrics.

headline: The Switch 2 is $50 off at Woot for new customers
summary: Woot is offering discounts on the Nintendo Switch 2 for its 22nd anniversary. Existing customers get $22 off, while new customers save $50. This deal provides a significant price reduction on Nintendo's latest console.

headline: The wireless headset that gets hot-swappable batteries right
summary: The Glorious GHS InfinitePlay wireless headset features an innovative hot-swap battery system. It prevents the headset from dying during battery changes, ensuring continuous play. This design offers a practical advantage over other gaming headsets for extended use.

headline: Nintendo keeps making shooters more friendly and approachable
summary: Nintendo's Splatoon series offers a unique and less violent approach to online shooters. It stands apart from traditional games like Call of Duty with its distinctive style. Nintendo aims to make the competitive online shooter genre more accessible and fun.

headline: Corsair Gaming Headsets Score Massive New Discounts at Amazon UK
summary: Amazon UK is offering significant discounts on popular Corsair gaming headsets. The VOID v2 wireless headset is now £89.99, down from its original price. The HS65 SURROUND wired headset is also discounted to just £72.78.

headline: Halo: Campaign Evolved and Game Freak's Beast of Reincarnation Lead Xbox Game Pass July 2026 Wave 2 Lineup
summary: Xbox Game Pass is adding major titles in July 2026 Wave 2 and early August. Headliners include Halo: Campaign Evolved, a highly anticipated addition. Game Freak's Beast of Reincarnation is also joining the lineup.

headline: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 on PS5 Is a Couple Dollars Less Than Its Prime Day Price Right Now at Amazon
summary: Clair Obscur: Expedition 33 for PS5 is currently at a new low price on Amazon. It's available for $37.49 with a coupon, making it cheaper than its Prime Day price. This limited-time offer expires on July 27 for interested buyers.

headline: Splatoon Raiders Review
summary: Splatoon Raiders is praised as a remarkably well-designed action RPG. The game features extensive customization options for players. It offers challenging battles that provide a deep gameplay experience.

headline: London-based civil servants offered move to No 10 North in Manchester
summary: London civil servants are being offered relocation packages to move north. The move is for positions at the new "No 10 North" office in Manchester. The initiative aims to decentralize government operations.

headline: Ann Widdecombe was hit on head repeatedly with hammer, prosecutors say
summary: Prosecutors revealed details in the murder case of Ann Widdecombe. She was reportedly hit repeatedly on the head with a hammer. Joshua Kerry, 28, from Rotherham, faces charges for her murder.

headline: Row escalates in Ukraine over army chief's future
summary: A dispute has intensified in Ukraine regarding the future of the army chief. Protesters demand the removal of Oleksandr Syrskyi by Friday. They also call for the reinstatement of former defense minister Mykhailo Fedorov.

headline: US launches fresh strikes on Iran, as Trump warns of retaliation for deaths of soldiers
summary: The US has conducted new strikes against targets in Iran. Former President Trump issued a warning of retaliation for soldier deaths. Iran claims to have hit ships in the Strait of Hormuz and targets in Bahrain and Jordan.
